name: Sheung Moon Holdings Limited
summary: Sheung Moon Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the business of civil engineering construction works in Hong Kong. The company undertakes site formation works, road and drainage works, and structural works for public and private sectors. It also holds properties. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong. Sheung Moon Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Chrysler Investments Limited.
